results.notes: Created T-162 from /tickets/create for Vandelay Industries with subject, description, P2 - High priority, and Network category. The detail page showed the entered subject, description, client, priority, and category.
Resolved T-162 with a non-empty resolution summary and verified the ticket showed Resolved plus the entered resolution text. The already-filed optional-empty-resolution gap remains open as psa-5d8f.

Reopened T-162 from Resolved to In Progress. The prior resolution remained visible as Prior resolution (ticket reopened), status-change notes were visible, and the ticket list search showed T-162 as In Progress.

axe.notes: Axe reported the known ticket-detail accessibility family: unlabeled buttons/inputs/selects, missing H1, redundant image alt, and muted-text contrast. These are already covered by open QA design beads psa-4638 and psa-de8u.

notes: No open or in-progress bead was assigned to tester at run start; this was an autonomous focused smoke from the scenario library.
The impeccable design-critique skill/tool was not available in this session or deferred tool search, so no new design finding was filed from an impeccable audit.
